name: Temple Of Morgash
description:
This is the temple to the Lizardmen's evil deity, Morgash.  It is
quite ugly.  At least in your opinion it is... you are certain that
the lizardmen like it though.
There are two exits.  Down and through the large door to the east.

exits.description: A large door blocks your way.
There is a hole leading down.  Obvious eh?

extra_descriptions.description: It is quite large with a small keyhole.
